retrieved_result: How much money does a jockey make for riding a horse in a race? Sports Horse Racing How much money does a jockey make for riding a horse in a race?1 following 8 answers Answers Relevance Rating Newest Oldest Best Answer: Jockeys are paid on a per mount (race) basis. The fees are between $30 per mount and $100 per mount depending on the purse structure at each pa
